instructions: When you encounter URLs matching these patterns, use the corresponding MCP server tools instead of WebFetch:

- docs.google.com/**, sheets.google.com/**, drive.google.com/**, slides.google.com/** → use the 'google-drive' MCP tools (supports Docs editing, Sheets cell management, Drive file operations, Slides, and Calendar)
- *.atlassian.net/wiki/**, confluence URLs → use the 'atlassian-confluence' MCP tools
When asked to read, edit, or interact with content from these services, prefer MCP tools over WebFetch or Bash commands.
